summary: Video set to music with narration. It mixes black-and-white illustrations of cheering people with color-graded footage of Trump and Melania descending the White House stairs, Trump in silhouette pointing at a large U.S. flag, and a low-angle shot of Trump against the sky. The title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL' recurs. Trump narration: 'one year ago our country was dead, now we are the hottest country anywhere in the world.' The clip ends on a black card with the white Department of Labor seal.

script.scene: Black-and-white illustration of a crowd of cheering people; centered title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL'; music begins, Trump narration: 'one year ago our country was dead...'
Sepia-toned footage of Trump and Melania descending a White House staircase holding hands; title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL' overlaid.
Silhouette of Trump pointing toward a large backlit American flag onstage; title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL.'
Low-angle shot of Trump looking into the distance against a bright cloudy sky; title 'THE AMERICAN REVIVAL'; narration: 'now we are the hottest country anywhere in the world.'
Black end card with the white Department of Labor seal; music ends.

notable_text: THE AMERICAN REVIVAL; (tweet) Patriotism is Prevailing. The American Revival is here.
